form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 350m in 20.23 last start, beating Big West. Likes the rails so looks to have an edge on most of these.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted from behind leaving the first turn and became momentarily unbalanced.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (20.31) at this track over 350m. Found one better last time. Well placed and worth following up.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by a nose at this track over 350m (20.52) beating Cane Toad in Grade 5 on April 14. Hard to recommend this time.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (20.51) in a Grade 5, finishing a 4 length third. Has two wins and five placings from 12 starts from the draw. Looking to others.
